# Sicredi — Design Tokens (fonte da verdade do tema `theme-sicredi`)

> Tema da experiência **Sicredi** (tenant `sicredi`: `/sicredi` e `/t/sicredi/*`).
> Espelha `src/styles/themes/sicredi.css`. Formato compatível com `src/lib/theme-parser.ts`
> (cores `**Nome** \`#hex\`` → token kebab-case; `Display/Body font` → `--font-display/--font-body`;
> seções Shape/Elevation → `--radius-*` / `--shadow-*`; `Heading weight` aplica em h1..h6).

## Color Palette
- **Bg Deep** `#FAFAFA`
- **Bg Base** `#FFFFFF`
- **Bg Elevated** `#FFFFFF`
- **Surface** `#FAFAFA`
- **Glass** `#FFFFFF`
- **Border** `#CDD3CD`
- **Border Accent** `#33820D`
- **Accent** `#33820D`
- **Accent Alt** `#26610A`
- **Accent Glow** `rgba(51,130,13,0.2)`
- **Green** `#33820D`
- **Amber** `#E6A500`
- **Red** `#AA003C`
- **Text** `#323C32`
- **Text Sub** `#828A82`
- **Text Muted** `#5A645A`
- **Background** `#FAFAFA`
- **Foreground** `#323C32`
- **Card** `#FFFFFF`
- **Card Foreground** `#323C32`
- **Primary** `#33820D`
- **Primary Foreground** `#FFFFFF`
- **Secondary** `#D7E6C8`
- **Secondary Foreground** `#26610A`
- **Muted** `#FAFAFA`
- **Muted Foreground** `#5A645A`
- **Destructive** `#AA003C`
- **Destructive Foreground** `#FFFFFF`
- **Input** `#CDD3CD`
- **Ring** `#33820D`
- **Sidebar** `#FAFAFA`
- **Sidebar Foreground** `#323C32`
- **Sidebar Primary** `#33820D`
- **Sidebar Primary Foreground** `#FFFFFF`
- **Sidebar Accent** `#D7E6C8`
- **Sidebar Accent Foreground** `#26610A`
- **Sidebar Border** `#CDD3CD`

## Typography
- Display font: `Exo 2`
- Body font: `Nunito`
- Heading weight: `300`

## Shape
- Radius card: `4px`
- Radius button: `8px`
- Radius chip: `100px`

## Elevation
- Shadow card: `0 2px 4px 0 #CDD3CD`
- Shadow md: `0 3px 10px 0 rgba(50,60,50,0.1)`
